title: Entering the Palace
content:
The grand gates of the imperial palace loomed before Li Wei as she stepped out of the sedan chair. Her heart raced with a mix of fear and anticipation. Once a noble lady, she was now entering the palace as a mere concubine, her family's fate resting on her shoulders.

The palace walls seemed to stretch endlessly, adorned with intricate carvings of dragons and phoenixes. Servants scurried about, their heads bowed in deference to the imperial family.
